Home › Lake County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Lake County

The following 19 restaurants in Lake County received a health grade of D or F at their most recent inspection, according to Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) public inspection records. Each listing shows its grade, score, and violation counts, ordered from the lowest score.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • C F 46
    COPACABANA CUBAN CAFE

    Cuban 4.1★ (2698)

    Mount Dora · Lake County

    VeganVegGF +5

    Violations: 3 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 8 basic

  • R F 46
    ROBATA JAPANESE STEAKHOUSE

    Japanese 4.2★ (1351)

    Clermont · Lake County

    VegGFDF +5

    Violations: 2 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 16 basic

  • R F 49
    ROSE PLANTATION

    American 4.5★ (1176)

    Fruitland Park · Lake County

    VeganVegKeto +2

    Violations: 4 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 5 basic

  • N F 52
    NEW CHINESE BUFFET INC

    Chinese 4.1★ (1558)

    Clermont · Lake County

    VegDFHealthy

    Violations: 3 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 12 basic

  • T F 53
    TAKIS RESTAURANT

    Leesburg · Lake County

    VegHealthy

    Violations: 5 high-priority, 7 basic
